Town Cop.description:
You are town-aligned and can investigate one player each night to learn their alignment.
Use `/investigate player-name` during the night phase in this DM with the bot.
Results will be sent as soon as the day phase starts. Use them wisely.
You win when all Mafia and the Serial Killer are dead.

Town Doctor.description:
You are town-aligned and can protect one player each night from being killed.
Use `/heal player-name` during the night phase in this DM with the bot.
You win when all Mafia and the Serial Killer are dead.
Town Doctor.short_description: Can heal one player each night.

abilities.heal: Prevent a player from being killed.

Plain Townie.description:
A regular member of the town.
During the day, you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched.
You win when all Mafia and the Serial Killer are dead.

Town Role Blocker.description:
You are town-aligned and can prevent one player from performing their night action each night.
Use `/block player-name` during the night phase in this DM with the bot.
You win when all Mafia and the Serial Killer are dead.
Town Role Blocker.short_description: Prevents one player from performing their night action.

abilities.block: Prevent a player from performing their night action.

Godfather.description:
Chooses the Mafia's target each night.
Use `/kill player-name` in this DM with the bot.
A separate message will be sent with the identity of other Mafia members.
You win when the Mafia can no longer be eliminated.
Godfather.short_description: Chooses the Mafia's target each night.

abilities.kill: Choose a player for the Mafia to kill.

Mob Goon.description:
A member of the Mafia.
You will be promoted to Godfather if the current one dies.
You win when the Mafia can no longer be eliminated.

Mob Role Blocker.description:
A member of the Mafia.
You can prevent one player from performing their night action each night.
Use `/block player-name` during the night phase in this DM with the bot.
You win when the Mafia can no longer be eliminated.
Mob Role Blocker.short_description: Stops a player from acting at night.

abilities.block: Prevent a player from performing their night action.

Serial Killer.description:
Kills one player each night.
Use `/kill player-name` in this DM with the bot.
You win when you are the last person standing.

Jester.description: Your goal is to get yourself lynched by the town. You have no night action.
Jester.short_description: Wins the game if they are lynched.
Jester.win_condition: Get yourself lynched by the town.

Vigilante.description: You are a lone wolf out for yourself. You can kill, heal, or block one player each night (your last submitted action will be used). Your goal is to be the last person standing.
Vigilante.short_description: Can kill, heal, or block. Wins by being the only survivor.

abilities.kill: Choose one player to kill each night.
abilities.block: Choose one player to block each night.
